creator: alexander.nusov@nfvexpress.com
text:
Created attachment 179288
openstack-bulk-2017.1

This patch updates several OpenStack libraries, some dependencies and clients as well.

Changelog:
- Update devel/py-automaton to 1.7.0
- Update devel/py-castellan to 0.5.0
- Update devel/py-cliff to 2.4.0
- Update devel/py-futurist to 0.21.0
- Update devel/py-glance-store to 0.20.0
- Update devel/py-keystoneauth1 to 2.17.0
- Update devel/py-keystonemiddleware to 4.14.0
- Update devel/py-os-brick to 1.10.0
- Update devel/py-os-client-config to 1.26.0
- Update devel/py-os-vif to 1.4.0
- Update devel/py-os-win to 1.4.0
- Update devel/py-osc-lib to 1.3.0
- Update devel/py-oslo.cache to 1.17.0
- Update devel/py-oslo.concurrency to 3.18.0
- Update devel/py-oslo.config to 3.19.0
- Update devel/py-oslo.context to 2.12.0
- Update devel/py-oslo.db to 4.17.0
- Update devel/py-oslo.log to 3.20.0
- Update devel/py-oslo.messaging to 5.17.0
- Update devel/py-oslo.middleware to 3.23.0

- Update devel/py-oslo.reports to 1.17.0
- Update devel/py-oslo.rootwrap to 5.4.0
- Update devel/py-oslo.service to 1.19.0
- Update devel/py-oslo.versionedobjects to 1.21.0
- Update devel/py-oslo.vmware to 2.17.0
- Update devel/py-osprofiler to 1.5.0
- Update devel/py-pycadf to 2.5.0
- Update devel/py-python-editor to 1.0.3
- Update devel/py-rtslib-fb to 2.1.62
- Update devel/py-taskflow to 2.9.0
- Update devel/py-tooz to 1.48.0
- Update devel/py-wsme to 0.9.1
